reviews.review_description:
As someone who plays extremely long vr sessions sometimes and hot swaps batteries this app is a GODSEND. It gives me a notification every time an external battery dies/charging stops, as well as I made it give me a notification every time the battery drops by 10%. Now I shouldn't have any more issues where my headset randomly dies. 

Massive quality of life upgrade for people in my situation. I highly recommend it!

This is a great app for people who play extended VR sessions. Sometimes I play longer than my extended battery lasts and having this app saves me from a surprise when the headset battery is about to die. Extremely useful and highly recommended.
The "Level" box would be better labeled % as this triggers the notification not one of the text boxes. Other than that it's a handy app.

Battery Level Notifier by Anagan Studio is a nifty little utility that keeps you on top of your headset’s battery life during long gaming sessions or movie marathons. You can easily customize when you want to be notified, choose your alert sound, and even get reminders when connecting your charger.

It’s lightweight, intuitive, and does exactly what you need — no fuss, just smart design. A must-have quality-of-life app for every VR user.
Would be a nice to have a % on the notification bar with the battery symbol and keep it on the notification bar 👍

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for your comment. Could you please contact me (support@quest-games-optimizer.com) so we can discuss this further? :-)
